message:
feat(fsqlite-btree): scaffold btree cursor, cell, balance, overflow, freelist, and payload modules

Build out the btree crate from stub to a structured module hierarchy:

- lib.rs: update module declarations and public API surface
- traits.rs: revise btree trait definitions for cursor navigation,
  cell formatting, and page splitting
- balance.rs (new): page balancing / splitting logic for insert overflow
- cell.rs (new): cell parsing and serialization (header + payload)
- cursor.rs (new): btree cursor for forward/backward traversal
- freelist.rs (new): freelist trunk/leaf page management
- overflow.rs (new): overflow page chain read/write
- payload.rs (new): payload spill threshold and local/overflow routing
- Cargo.toml: add new dependencies required by the expanded modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
